title: Grimm Craft
description: A hack-and-slash RPG modpack featuring Mine and Slash. Level up, choose a class, and explore a stunning world shaped by Biomes O’ Plenty and Lithosphere. Discover hidden dungeons, ruins, and towers teeming with enemies, loot, and adventure!
body:
Grimm Craft is a dynamic action RPG modpack that transforms Minecraft into a hack-and-slash dungeon-crawling experience. At its core, the Mine and Slash mod introduces deep RPG mechanics, allowing you to level up, allocate ability points, choose a class, and master powerful abilities through an Ascension Tree system.

But combat is only part of the journey—the world itself is alive with adventure. Using Biomes O' Plenty and Lithosphere, the modpack crafts a breathtaking and immersive landscape filled with lush forests, towering cliffs, vast deserts, and mysterious ruins. However, danger lurks beneath the beauty.

### Key Features
**⚔ Hack-and-Slash Combat** – Mine and Slash redefines fighting with class-based skills, loot-driven progression, and strategic combat.

**🌍 Enhanced World Generation** – Biomes O’ Plenty and Lithosphere create a visually stunning, diverse, and immersive overworld.

**🏰 Dungeon Crawling & Exploration** – Seek out hidden dungeons, caverns, ruins, castles, and towers filled with enemies, traps, and treasures.

**🔮 Deep RPG Progression** – Level up, customize your build, unlock powerful abilities, and advance through the Ascension Tree.

**💎 Loot & Customization** – Find, craft, and enhance weapons, armor, and enchantments tailored to your playstyle.

**🏹 Endless Adventure** – No two worlds are alike—exploration is limitless, with dynamic environments and challenging encounters at every turn.

Whether you're delving into dark dungeons, slashing through hordes of enemies, or perfecting your combat skills, Grimm Craft offers an engaging, RPG-driven experience for those who seek challenge, adventure, and mastery in their Minecraft world.

Prepare your weapons, sharpen your skills, and embrace the legend of Grimm Craft!
